hero_subtext: Your seal of confidence. Confidently build and restore with Kemco's waterproofing excellence. From leaks to solutions, we've got your next project covered.
values_body: Water leaks pose the biggest natural threat to structures. Often, poor workmanship stands as the primary reason for waterproofing failure. Join the group of esteemed General Contractors who trust Kemco's comprehensive knowledge to protect their projects.
cta_subtext: Experts in both Above-Grade and Below-Grade Waterproofing.
veteran_headline: Proudly serving those who build our communities.
veteran_body: Kemco is proud to be a Texas Historically Underutilized Business (HUB) certified veteran-owned business. HUB's goals are to increase the opportunities available to businesses owned by minorities and women. That means when you partner with us on projects, you support U.S. Military veterans in our area. Together, we can drive growth and make a positive impact in the community.
